en.text: . sent out: Heb. cast forth was like: Heb. thought to be broken
unto him, What meanest thou, O sleeper
is upon us. So they cast
us, we pray thee, for whose cause this evil
is upon us; What is thine occupation
unto them, I am an Hebrew
unto him, Why hast thou done
them. exceedingly: Heb. with great fear
they unto him, What shall we do
. may: Heb. may be silent from us wrought: or, grew more and more tempestuous: Heb. went
against them. rowed: Heb. digged wrought: or, grew more and more tempestuous: Heb. went
, we beseech thee, let us not perish
. offered: Heb. sacrifice unto the LORD, and vowed vows
. by: or, out of mine affliction hell: or, the grave
. bottoms: Heb. cuttings off corruption: or, the pit
of them even to the least
And he caused it to be proclaimed
: published: Heb. said nobles: Heb. great men
, when I was yet in my country
from me; for it is better
? Doest: or, Art thou greatly angry?
what would become of the city
, and made it to come up
, that it might be a shadow
. gourd: or, palmcrist: Heb. Kikajon was: Heb. rejoiced with great joy
And it came to pass, when the sun
. Doest: or, Art thou greatly angry? I do well: or, I am greatly angry
, for the which thou hast not laboured
; which came up in a night
: had pity: or, spared came: Heb. was the son of the night
